email_draft:
Hi Alicia,

My name is Tory, and I'm one of the founders of Recovered Factory. I'm reaching out because I'm reporting a story based on an analysis of five years of Missouri traffic stop data — part of a public database we recently launched.

I saw your quote in the First Alert 4 investigation — that 90% of MICA's Rapid Response Line callers enter ICE custody starting from a traffic stop. That number is central to the story I'm reporting. Our data analysis shows Hispanic traffic stops in Missouri rose 57% between 2020 and 2024 — driven almost entirely by discretionary stop categories like equipment violations and investigative stops. I'd love to talk about what you're seeing through the Rapid Response Line, what the pattern looks like on the ground, and whether MICA could connect me with people whose ICE custody started at a traffic stop.

We recently launched a public database of Missouri's Vehicle Stops Report — you can see the announcement, the live site, and our homepage here:
